original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: United States Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
original_registry_entry.version: CDC Yellow Book: Health Information for International Travel, 2026 edition
original_registry_entry.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires destination-specific and UAE adaptation
original_registry_entry.population: International travelers, preserving itinerary, destination, duration, purpose, activity, age, pregnancy, immune status, chronic illness and special-risk qualifiers.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Pre-travel consultation in travel-medicine or primary-care settings, with specialist input for complex travelers.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for documenting traveler health background, itinerary, trip purpose, activities, prior travel, immunization and medicine context and individualized risk assessment; no vaccine, medicine, dose or advice is mapped.

exact_sections.heading: Components of a pre-travel consultation
exact_sections.locator: official chapter section “Components of a pre-travel consultation”
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting health background, itinerary, trip duration, purpose, planned activities, country-specific context, consultation limits and need for specialist input without generating advice.

exact_sections.heading: Assess individual risk
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording medical history, special conditions, immunization history, medicines, prior travel, timing, reason, travel style, activities, destination disease context and special-risk groups without calculating risk or recommending intervention.

title: The Pre-Travel Consultation
publisher: United States Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires destination-specific and UAE adaptation
population: International travelers, preserving itinerary, destination, duration, purpose, activity, age, pregnancy, immune status, chronic illness and special-risk qualifiers.
intended_setting: Pre-travel consultation in travel-medicine or primary-care settings, with specialist input for complex travelers.
